title: cyclosorus loherianus
intro: Cyclosorus loherianus, also known as the Lohier's fern or the Loher's spleenwort, is a type of fern native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus loherianus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and aid in digestion, making it a valuable remedy in herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the leaves and stems typically being used in these preparations.
